title: My Ratings
meta_description: View, edit, and delete all the ratings and reviews you have written on DaNangTrip.

empty.title: No ratings yet
empty.subtitle: Book amazing tours or visit popular spots to share your valuable experiences with us!

modal_edit.title: Edit Review
modal_edit.comment_placeholder: Share your authentic experience here (min 10 characters, max 500 characters)...

dialog_delete.title: Delete Review?
dialog_delete.message: Are you sure you want to delete this review? This action will be permanently deleted and cannot be undone.

toasts.update_error: Failed to update review. Please check your inputs.
toasts.delete_error: Failed to delete review. Please try again later.
toasts.image_size_error: Image size exceeds 5MB limit. Please choose another file.
toasts.image_limit_error: You can only upload up to 5 images.
toasts.load_error: Failed to load ratings history. Please try again.
